meaning: n.就任者,应召入伍的士兵
examples: In 2002, he became the first inductee into Guitar World magazine's Hall of Fame.
Former NBA player and 2009 inductee Michael Jordan speaks during the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2009 Enshrinement Ceremony in Springfield, Massachusetts September 11, 2009.
Another well-known inductee to the Hall Of Fame is David Astor, Observer editor from 1948 until 1975.
It will mark the first time since 1965 that the Hall will have a ceremony without a living inductee.
At the Hall ceremonies in July, new inductee Bert Blyleven mentioned Carter.
